frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Honestly, no matter how modern we become, women deserve respect first because they are someone's daughter, wife or mother. Society stays balanced when we remember that and don't reduce them to just individuals with no family role.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women's worth and entitlement to respect primarily through their relationships to family roles rather than as autonomous persons. It encodes relational framing and conditional respect in a polished, seemingly respectful tone.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
